classes.label: Student Reward
classes.description: Represents a reward or award given to a student.

classes.label: Student Discipline
classes.description: Represents a disciplinary action or violation record for a student.

classes.label: Academic Completion
classes.description: Represents the completion or termination of a student's studies, including certificates awarded.

classes.label: Employment Agreement
classes.description: Represents the employment agreement and destination details for a graduating student.

datatype_properties.label: Reward Type Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the type of reward.

datatype_properties.label: Reward Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the method of the reward.

datatype_properties.label: Discipline Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of the disciplinary violation.

datatype_properties.label: Discipline Summary
datatype_properties.description: Summary of the disciplinary violation.

datatype_properties.label: Discipline Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the category of the violation.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Name Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the name of the punishment.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the punishment.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the punishment was issued.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Official document number of the punishment.
evidence: 处分的正式文号，无正式文号不填

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Revocation Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the punishment was revoked.

datatype_properties.label: Punishment Revocation Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Official document number of the revocation.
evidence: 撤消的正式文号，无正式文号不填

datatype_properties.label: Academic Completion Date
datatype_properties.description: Year and month of completing or ending studies.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Completion Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the completion status.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Completion Reason
datatype_properties.description: Explanation for the reason of ending studies.

datatype_properties.label: Graduation Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the graduation certificate.

datatype_properties.label: Degree Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the degree certificate.

datatype_properties.label: Completion Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the completion certificate.

datatype_properties.label: Graduation Certificate Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the graduation certificate was received.

datatype_properties.label: Degree Certificate Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the degree certificate was received.

datatype_properties.label: Completion Certificate Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the completion certificate was received.

datatype_properties.label: Agreement Number
datatype_properties.description: School-assigned number for the employment agreement.

datatype_properties.label: Agreement Signing Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the agreement was signed.

datatype_properties.label: Agreement Duration
datatype_properties.description: Duration of the agreement in years.

datatype_properties.label: Reporting Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of reporting to the employer.

datatype_properties.label: Employment Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the method of employment settlement.

datatype_properties.label: Graduation Destination Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the destination after graduation.
evidence: 中小学、中职学生采用 BYQX 毕业去向代码，高校毕业生采用GXBYQX 高校毕业去向代码

datatype_properties.label: Receiving Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the receiving employer or unit.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Location Code
datatype_properties.description: Administrative division code of the receiving unit's location.
evidence: 接收单位所在地区划码

datatype_properties.label: Unit Supervisory Department
datatype_properties.description: Supervisory department of the receiving unit.

datatype_properties.label: Unit Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the nature of the social unit.
